rows.label: xs04500110_MSG0001
rows.name:
Looks like the Life Point is
beyond this rocky mountain, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04500110_MSG0002
rows.name:
Momomomo, we're going over
this rocky mountain, mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04500110_MSG0003
rows.name:
Even if Tatsu is okay, Lin-san
absolutely can't do it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04500110_MSG0004
rows.name: How rude! You're the one who can't do it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04500110_MSG0008
rows.name:
Elma-san, since Tatsu seems like he
can't make it, let's find another way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04500110_MSG0010
rows.name:
There was a fork in the path on the way
here. Let's go back and take that route.[ST:wait ]
